domain_descriptions: Inner ear hair cell lipoxygenase homology domain-containing protein
structural_features: Inner ear hair cell lipoxygenase homology domain-containing protein
conserved_regions: Inner ear hair cell lipoxygenase homology domain-containing protein
ciliary_role: Nonsense mutation associated with retinitis pigmentosa (10401003). Microtubule- associated protein containing the doublecortin (DCX) domain. Disruption of Rp1 in mice causes misorientation of outer segment discs, suggesting a role in outer segment organisation. Stimulates microtubule polymerization and stabilise existing  in vitro and in vivo, therefore, it controls the length and stability of the photoreceptor axoneme (15269252). Due to Rp1 localisation, it may be involved in the formation of outer segments (11773008). Plays synergistic role with Rp1L1 in affecting photosensitivity and OS morphogenesis of rod photoreceptors (19657028).

ai_summary.basic_summary: RP1 is a ciliary gene encoding rp1 axonemal microtubule associated [source:hgnc symbol;acc:hgnc:10263]
